simple_types.name: LED_Component
simple_types.code: type LED_Component is (LED_Red, LED_Green, LED_Blue, LED_White);

array_types.name: LED_Values
array_types.code: type LED_Values is array (LED_Component) of LED_Value;

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code: function Create (Mode : LED_Mode; Count : Positive) return LED_Strip

subprograms.name: Set_Color

documentation.description: Set the color of the designated pixel to the given color

subprograms.name: Show
